name: r-reindent
description: RStudio-style vertical argument alignment for R, Quarto, and R Markdown files

keybindings.when: editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == r || editorLangId == rmd || editorLangId == quarto)

editor/context.when: editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == r || editorLangId == rmd || editorLangId == quarto)

r-reindent.verticalAlign.description: Vertically align function arguments to the column after the opening bracket (RStudio-style). When false, uses a single tab-stop instead.

r-reindent.tabWidth.description: Number of spaces per indent level (default: 2).

scripts.test: npm run compile && node --test test/runner.mjs test/runner-blank-indent.mjs test/runner-defer-to-prev.mjs test/runner-line-at-a-time.mjs test/runner-cursor.mjs
